## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** Navigation Menu With Landmarks  
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Keyboard & Motor, Cognitive & Neurodivergent

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| MAJOR | 1 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

### Perspectives That Passed

- Magnification & Reflow  
- Environmental Contrast  
- Vestibular & Motion  
- Auditory Access  
- Keyboard & Motor  
- Cognitive & Neurodivergent  

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Content Author**  
- **Missing Page Title** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — WCAG 2.4.2  
  **Evidence:** No `<title>` element present in component  
  **Fix:** Add `<title>Widget Pro | Acme Corp</title>` at page root

**Front-End Dev**  
- **Missing Page Title** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — WCAG 2.4.2  
  **Evidence:** No `<title>` element present in component  
  **Fix:** Add `<title>Widget Pro | Acme Corp</title>` at page root

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Full Finding Details

```
**Finding:** Page lacks `<title>` element to identify content in screen reader and browser tabs  
**WCAG:** 2.4.2 Page Title  
**Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic  
**Severity:** MAJOR  
**Route to:** Content Author (secondary: Front-End Dev)  
**Evidence:** No `<title>` element present in component code  
**Fix:** Add `<title>Widget Pro | Acme Corp</title>` at the top of the page structure
```

---

## Component Audit Findings

### ✅ Passed Requirements

1. **Landmark regions**  
   - All required landmarks present: `<header>`, `<main>`, `<aside>`, `<footer>`  
   - Four `<nav>` elements with distinct `aria-label` attributes

2. **Heading hierarchy**  
   - Logical hierarchy: `<h1>` for page title, `<h2>` for sections  
   - No skipped heading levels  
   - `aria-labelledby` used correctly for sections

3. **Interactive elements**  
   - All links have descriptive text (no "click here")  
   - Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements

4. **ARIA usage**  
   - `aria-label` used appropriately for navigation landmarks  
   - `aria-current="page"` applied to breadcrumb item

5. **DOM order**  
   - Visual layout matches document source order  
   - Skip link appears first in tab order

---

## Code-Level Observations

1. **Skip link implementation**  
   - Visually hidden by default (`left: -10000px`)  
   - Becomes visible on focus (`position: static`)  
   - Targets main content via `id="main-content"`

2. **Focus styles**  
   - Consistent 3px blue outline on all focusable elements  
   - Contrast ratio of 5.4:1 between focus indicator and background

3. **Breadcrumb navigation**  
   - Uses ordered list with proper `aria-current` on current page  
   - Clear visual separation between items

---

## Content-Level Observations

1. **Link text clarity**  
   - All links use descriptive text (e.g., "Products", "Solutions")  
   - No ambiguous link text like "click here"

2. **Section labeling**  
   - `aria-labelledby` connects sections to their headings  
   - Clear visual hierarchy between main content and sidebar

3. **Visual design**  
   - Distinct visual styles for different navigation types  
   - Current breadcrumb item has bold styling and no underline

---

## Recommendations

1. **Add page title**  
   - Implement `<title>Widget Pro | Acme Corp</title>` at the page root  
   - Ensure title is unique and descriptive for all pages

2. **Verify language attribute**  
   - Confirm `<html lang="en">` is present in the document root  
   - Add `lang` attribute if missing (WCAG 3.1.1)

3. **Consider additional enhancements**  
   - Add `aria-label` to the "Acme Corp" logo link for clarity  
   - Ensure all parent components have proper `lang` attributes

---

## Compliance Summary

| WCAG 2.2 AA | Status |
|---|---|
| 1.3.1 Info and Relationships | ✅ Passed |
| 1.3.2 Meaningful Sequence | ✅ Passed |
| 2.4.2 Page Title | ❌ Missing |
| 2.4.4 Link Purpose | ✅ Passed |
| 2.4.6 Headings and Landmarks | ✅ Passed |
| 3.1.1 Language of Page | ⚠️ Verify |
| 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value | ✅ Passed |
| 4.1.3 Status Messages | N/A (no dynamic content) |

---

## Next Steps

1. Add page title to resolve MAJOR finding  
2. Verify language attribute is set in document root  
3. Re-run audit to confirm fixes
